name: XLC Administradora General De Fondos SA - XLC Deuda Privada Fintech FI Fund
summary: XLC Administradora General De Fondos SA - XLC Deuda Privada Fintech FI Fund is a private debt investment fund focused on Fintech companies. It is managed by XLC Administradora General De Fondos SA and invests in private debt instruments of Fintech companies.
